form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 29.83 when second at this track latest but the run prior she recorded a respectable 17.70 over 305m finishing third at this track. Has the ability and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (43.20) over 732m at this track. Drawn a inside box but prefer the place this line-up.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 400m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (23.35) behind Compton Lizzie in a Grade 5 on April 12. Overdue and expected to feature again.

form.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional for two wins in a row last time clocking 22.96 with a 5.5 lengths win at this track over 400m. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.
